items.title: Virginia Governor Signs Law Protecting Dormant Crypto From Forced Liquidation
items.summary: The legislation ensures unclaimed digital assets are held in their native form for at least one year before the state can move to sell them.

items.title: Bitcoin pulls back as $75,000 remains 'both the milestone and the ceiling'
items.summary: Bitcoin is struggling to break and hold above the key $75,000 resistance level while ether, solana decline.

items.title: Bitcoin ETFs Draw $411M After BTC Hits $75K, But Analysts Urge Caution
items.summary: Analysts cited easing geopolitical tensions and improving liquidity as driving Bitcoin’s uptick, but warned of a “weak and unstable” market.

items.title: The 100% debt trap: Why the IMF’s latest warning is a massive long-term signal for bitcoin
items.summary: The IMF warns that global public debt could reach about 100% of world GDP by 2029.

items.title: OKX launches X-Perps, MiFID-regulated crypto derivatives in Europe
items.summary: OKX has launched X-Perps in Europe under MiFID rules, which offer five-year expiry crypto derivatives with up to 10x leverage across BTC, ETH and other tokens.

items.title: eToro to acquire Zengo in self-custody push as CEO predicts $250K Bitcoin
items.summary: eToro is set to acquire self-custodial wallet provider Zengo, and the trading platform’s CEO predicted a Bitcoin rally above $250,000 after another quarter of crypto market downside.

items.title: A new class of crypto treasury companies is forming around Strategy’s high-yield stock
items.summary: Firms and protocols are accumulating Strategy’s preferred stock to capture yield and bitcoin-linked exposure.

items.title: Why this ex-Solana exec is using a Wall Street trick to level the playing field in DeFi

items.title: EToro to acquire crypto wallet Zengo in $70 million deal

items.title: Winklevoss Capital moves $43 million in bitcoin to custody after hitting lowest balance since 2012
items.summary: Arkham data shows 572 BTC moved from Gemini's hot wallet to Winklevoss custody addresses in two transactions in 17 hours, reversing part of last month's $128.5 million deposit.

items.title: Ripple teams with Kyobo on South Korea tokenized bond settlement
items.summary: Ripple and Kyobo Life are piloting tokenized government bond settlement as South Korea builds rules for token securities and digital asset payments.

items.title: Bitcoin ETFs post $412M in inflows as Goldman Sachs files for BTC ETF
items.summary: US-listed spot Bitcoin ETFs posted $411.5 million in inflows Tuesday as Goldman Sachs filed for a Bitcoin-linked ETF, lifting 2026 net flows back into positive territory.

items.summary: Societe Generale-FORGE said MetaMask will add its MiCA-compliant USDCV stablecoin, extending distribution for one of Europe’s bank-backed digital dollars.

items.title: North Korean hackers used AI-enabled social engineering in Zerion attack
items.summary: It is the second long-term social-engineering attack this month, after the $280 million exploit of the Drift Protocol.

items.title: X rolls out smart cashtags in US, Canada in step toward ‘everything app’
items.summary: Tat Thang, a partner at the prediction platform Polymarket, suggests X is building a Web3 equivalent of the Chinese WeChat Pay citing its recent moves to scrub crypto bots.

items.title: Crypto users targeted in ‘elaborate’ scam using popular notes app
items.summary: Elastic Security Labs says a multi-step social engineering scam is aimed at those in crypto and finance, using a community plugin feature on a note-taking app to spread malicious device-controlling software.

items.title: Ethereum treasury firm Bitmine reports $3.8 billion Q1 loss in latest filing
items.summary: The largest corporate ether holder posted a $3.8 billion quarterly loss as its pivot from mining to ETH accumulation continues.

items.title: Bitcoin developers are trying to build quantum defenses. Your coins could pay the price.

items.title: Apple removes fake Ledger app that stole $9.5M from crypto investors
items.summary: Apple told Cointelegraph that the fake Ledger Live app was removed and that the developer was terminated from its app store.

items.title: Switzerland’s Crypto Valley funding rose 37% in 2025 as TON led deals

items.title: Ether-bitcoin ratio bounces from 2026 lows, signaling broader crypto recovery

items.title: Bitcoiners propose freezing quantum-vulnerable coins in BIP-361
